sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97473" key="subari/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡβᾰρ-ίζω</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῡβᾰρ-ισμός</orth>, <sense id="n97473.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">συβριάζω, -ασμός</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
